_comment: This is the only file you edit to manage the directory. Add a new object to the array for each paid member business. Categories appear as filters automatically. 'paid_until' lets you track renewals (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave 'logo' as a short set of initials if you have no image.

businesses.name: Ace Plumbing & Gas
businesses.blurb: Emergency and general plumbing across the southern suburbs. Burst pipes, hot water, blocked drains — same-day where possible.

businesses.name: Courtside Physio
businesses.blurb: Sports physiotherapy with a soft spot for rolled ankles and jammed fingers. Club members get priority bookings.

businesses.name: Marion Legal
businesses.blurb: Conveyancing, wills, and small-business advice. Plain English, no jargon, fixed quotes.

businesses.name: The Corner Roast
businesses.blurb: Specialty coffee and toasties two minutes from the stadium. Show your membership for a free upsize.

businesses.name: Box Out Electrical
businesses.blurb: Domestic and commercial electrical. Switchboards, downlights, EV chargers. Fully licensed and insured.

businesses.name: Full Court Accounting
businesses.blurb: Tax returns, BAS, and bookkeeping for sole traders and small businesses. Club discount on first-year returns.

businesses.name: Rebound Realty
businesses.blurb: Residential sales and property management across the inner south. A slice of every club-member sale goes back to the club.

businesses.name: Pivot Design Co.
businesses.blurb: Logos, websites, and signage for local businesses. Built this kind of directory, in fact — happy to help yours.
